section_miscategorizations.text: A right upper quadrant ultrasound is ordered.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an order/plan for imaging, not an already-performed procedure or observed result, so it belongs in the Plan.
This is an order/action (sending labs), not a reported result; it should be documented as part of the management plan.

section_miscategorizations.text: A right upper quadrant ultrasound is planned.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Content is appropriate for the Plan, but it duplicates the imaging order that is incorrectly placed in Objective; organizationally it would be clearer to consolidate imaging plans in one Plan statement.

section_miscategorizations.text: Further imaging or intervention may be considered.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is more of a high-level clinical consideration/assessment of future needs rather than a specific actionable plan; however, keeping it in the Plan is not seriously misleading.
